result.summary: The page is mostly rendering correctly, but there is a noticeable horizontal overflow/layout issue causing content on the right edge to be cut off. This makes some navigation and game tiles appear partially hidden.

issues.description: The top category row is clipped on the right, with the last pill ('Hot Games') only partially visible.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the row either fits within the viewport responsively or clearly supports horizontal scrolling without hiding the last item off-screen.

issues.description: Several game tiles in the main grids are cut off at the right edge, leaving the last column partially visible and hard to access.
issues.suggestion: Fix the responsive grid/container width so cards stay fully within the screen, or add an obvious horizontal scroll treatment if overflow is intentional.
